title: MOTCraft Mod
description: This mod adds multiple crafting recipes to minecraft
body:
This mod adds 
- Multiple crafting recipes to minecraft like,
  - 9 sticks to any log
  - 2 slab back into there block form
  - 3 of any wood and 3 of any wool to a white bed
  - 1 sapling to 8 sticks
  - and more in the Gallery
- Create fire with 2 sticks
  - can be turned off in config
- Star wars Credits
  - Dezicred Credit
  - Durite Credit
  - Chromium Credit
    - Chromium Credit Base
  - Osmiridium Credit
    - Osmiridium Credit Base
  - 1/10th Diamond
  - Half Diamond
  - Compressed Diamond
  - Compressed Diamond Block
  - recipes in Gallery
- A lifesteal function
  - Can be turned off in config
- String Duper
  - Can be turned off in config
- A gui to fletching table
  - Potion arrows
